title: Key & Lock Services: We are key to unlocking your problems
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Key & Lock Services has...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Key & Lock Services has been voted the Best Door and Window Security company in George for the second year.


> We can't be happier that our customers regard our services so highly!


For the past 47 years, we have been solving your lock and security issues in the Garden Route, from Plettenberg Bay to Still Bay and surrounds.

Under the new ownership of the experienced Leon and Jacomien van der Hoven, our trained sales personnel and qualified locksmiths are there to solve your problem.

From our premises at 40 Market Street, George, we supply not only the largest variety of locks and security products under one roof, but also 24h locksmithing services, ironmongery (handles, locks and door hardware), wooden doors and frames, garage doors and automation, security gates, number plates, safes and much more - all at very competitive prices.

We also supply and install BBL smart locks that offer fingerprint, code and app access to your property.

Our products are of the best quality and latest technology. All this with a can-do attitude and not only a true desire to help you solve your security problems, but to also deliver top-level service.

A deeply felt thank you to our loyal clients for your support over the years.

Clients, new residents and businesses, come visit our establishment and see what we have to offer.


> Here's some reviews from our customers:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
